description_long: This humanoid robot features a segmented, mechanical body with a distinctly industrial design. Its head is rectangular with pronounced, gear-like details and what appear to be two large, circular eye sockets, giving it a mechanical face. The torso is composed of stacked, cylindrical segments, and the arms and legs are made up of multiple jointed sections, resembling a series of connected rods and spheres. The hands are flat and paddle-shaped, while the feet are wide and forked, providing stability. The entire structure is uniform in color and texture, with a matte metallic finish and no visible coverings or decorations. The robot's overall appearance is utilitarian, with exposed joints and mechanical components suggesting functionality over aesthetics.
description: A segmented, industrial humanoid robot with a rectangular head, jointed limbs, and paddle-shaped hands, all in a matte metallic finish. Its design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical details and no coverings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's rectangular head with two large eye sockets, outstretched arms, and forked feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thin profile, segmented limbs, and the depth of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, cylindrical torso, and symmetrical limb structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the mechanical joints and the flatness of the hands and feet.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; only integrated mechanical panels and components are visible.
attribute_facial_features: Rectangular head with two large, circular eye sockets and gear-like details; no visible mouth or nose; face is mechanical and expressionless.
attribute_limb_articulation: Multiple visible articulation points on arms and legs, including rotary and hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands and feet appear rigid with minimal articulation.
